scripts.build: tsc && sass src/styles/scss/index.scss src/styles/css/index.css && rimraf out && mkdir out && cp index.html privacy-policy.html terms-and-conditions.html out/ && cp -R src out/
scripts.dev: npx rimraf src/scripts/js && concurrently "tsc --watch" "live-server" "sass --watch src/styles/scss/index.scss src/styles/css/index.css"
